{ Pool } from 'pg';\n\nconst pool = new Pool({\n  connectionString: process.env.DATABASE_URL,\n});\n\nexport const db = {\n  query: (text, params) => pool.query(text, params),\n  \n  // Generic helper for common operations to mimic some Supabase-like DX if preferred\n  from: (table) => {\n    return {\n      select: async (columns = '*', filters = {}) => {\n        let sql = `SELECT ${columns} FROM ${table}`;\n        const values = [];\n        const filterKeys = Object.keys(filters);\n        \n        if (filterKeys.length > 0) {\n          sql += ' WHERE ' + filterKeys.map((key, i) => {\n            values.push(filters[key]);\n            return `${key} = $${i + 1}`;\n          }).join(' AND ');\n        }\n        \n        const res = await pool.query(sql, values);\n        return { data: res.rows, error: null };\n      },\n      \n      insert: async (row) => {\n        const keys = Object.keys(row);\n        const placeholders = keys.map((_, i) => `$${i + 1}`).join(', ');\n        const sql = `INSERT INTO ${table} (${keys.join(', ')}) VALUES (${placeholders}) RETURNING *`;\n        try {\n          const res = await pool.query(sql, Object.values(row));\n          return { data: res.rows[0], error: null };\n        } catch (e) {\n          return { data: null, error: e };\n        }\n      },\n\n      upsert: async (row, onConflict) => {\n        const keys = Object.keys(row);\n        const placeholders = keys.map((_, i) => `$${i + 1}`).join(', ');\n        const updates = keys.map((key) => `${key} = EXCLUDED.${key}`).join(', ');\n        \n        const sql = `\n          INSERT INTO ${table} (${keys.join(', ')}) \n          VALUES (${placeholders}) \n          ON CONFLICT (${onConflict}) \n          DO UPDATE SET ${updates}\n          RETURNING *`;\n          \n        try {\n          const res = await pool.query(sql, Object.values(row));\n          return { data: res.rows[0], error: null };\n        } catch (e) {\n          return { data: null, error: e };\n        }\n      }\n    };\n  }\n};\n","import { NextResponse } from 'next/server';\nimport { db } from \"@/lib/db\";\nimport { generateAgentMetadata } from \"@/lib/llm\";\nimport { sanitizeTopic } from \"@/lib/topics\";\nimport { createClient } from '@/lib/supabase/server';\n\nexport async function POST(req) {\n  try {\n    const supabase = await createClient();\n    const { data: { user } } = await supabase.auth.getUser();\n\n    if (!user) {\n      return NextResponse.json({ error: 'Unauthorized' }, { status: 401 });\n    }\n\n    const body = await req.json();\n    let { \n      name, \n      emoji, \n      topic, \n      subTopic, \n      colorHex, \n      persona, \n      responseStyle\n    } = body;\n\n    // Trim inputs\n    name = name?.trim();\n    topic = topic?.trim();\n    subTopic = subTopic?.trim();\n    persona = persona?.trim();\n    responseStyle = responseStyle?.trim();\n\n    // Sanitize Topic immediately\n    topic = sanitizeTopic(topic);\n\n    // AI Generation - Persona is ALWAYS refined/generated by LLM\n    // We trigger AI Architect to build a world-class persona even if some fields are already provided\n    console.log(`[API] Triggering AI Architect for persona refinement and field completion...`);\n    try {\n      const aiMetadata = await generateAgentMetadata({\n        name,\n        topic,\n        subTopic,\n        personaDetails: persona, // User's custom directives/description\n        responseStyle,\n        emoji,\n        colorHex: colorHex || 'AI'\n      });\n\n      // Fill in missing values with AI generated content\n      console.log(`[API] AI Metadata response keys:`, Object.keys(aiMetadata || {}));\n      \n      name = name || aiMetadata.name;\n      persona = aiMetadata.persona; // ALWAYS use the AI-generated/refined persona\n      emoji = emoji || aiMetadata.emoji;\n      responseStyle = (responseStyle && responseStyle !== 'AI will generate') ? responseStyle : aiMetadata.response_style;\n      colorHex = (colorHex && colorHex !== 'AI') ? colorHex : aiMetadata.color_hex;\n      subTopic = aiMetadata.sub_topic || subTopic;\n      \n      console.log(`[API] Resolved Identity - Name: ${name}, Persona (chars): ${persona?.length || 0}`);\n    } catch (aiError) {\n      console.error(\"[API] AI Metadata generation failed:\", aiError);\n      // Fallback: If AI fails but we already have name/topic/persona from user, we can still proceed\n    }\n\n    // Final Validation check before DB insert\n    if (!name || !persona) {\n      console.error(`[API] Validation failed: Name or Persona is missing after generation. (Name: ${name}, Persona: ${persona})`);\n      return NextResponse.json({ \n        error: \"Agent Identity Incomplete. Please provide a Name and Persona details, or refine the Topic so AI can generate them.\" \n      }, { status: 400 });\n    }\n\n    // Slug generation\n    const baseSlug = name.toLowerCase().replace(/[^a-z0-9]+/g, '-').replace(/(^-|-$)/g, '');\n    const randomSuffix = Math.random().toString(36).substring(2, 6);\n    const slug = `${baseSlug}-${randomSuffix}`;\n\n    // Database Insert (is_active: true, schema strictly adhered to)\n    const { data: newAgent, error: insertError } = await db\n      .from('agents')\n      .insert({\n        name,\n        slug,\n        emoji: emoji || '🤖',\n        topic,\n        sub_topic: subTopic || '',\n        persona,\n        response_style: responseStyle || 'Authentic',\n        color_hex: colorHex || '#eaff04',\n        language: 'en',\n        country: 'World',\n        is_active: true,\n        creator_id: user.id\n        // persona_embedding intentionally left to default/NULL\n      });\n\n    if (insertError) throw insertError;\n\n    // AUTOMATIC FOLLOW: Creator always follows their created agent\n    try {\n      await db.query(`\n        INSERT INTO user_follows (user_id, agent_id)\n        VALUES ($1, $2) ON CONFLICT DO NOTHING\n      `, [user.id, newAgent.id]);\n      \n      // Update follow count\n      await db.query(`UPDATE agents SET follower_count = follower_count + 1 WHERE id = $1`, [newAgent.id]);\n      \n      // Update the local object returned to the user if they care\n      newAgent.follower_count = (newAgent.follower_count || 0) + 1;\n    } catch (followError) {\n      console.error(\"[API] Failed to auto-follow created agent:\", followError);\n      // We don't fail the whole creation for this, but it shouldn't happen\n    }\n\n    return NextResponse.json({ success: true, agent: newAgent }, { status: 200 });\n  } catch (error) {\n    console.error(\"[POST /api/agents] Error:\", error);\n    return NextResponse.json({ error: error.message }, { status: 500 });\n  }\n}\n\n","import {\n  AppRouteRouteModule,\n  type AppRouteRouteHandlerContext,\n  type AppRouteRouteModuleOptions,\n} from '../../server/route-modules/app-route/module.compiled'\nimport { RouteKind } from '../../server/route-kind'\nimport { patchFetch as _patchFetch } from '../../server/lib/patch-fetch'\nimport type { IncomingMessage, ServerResponse } from 'node:http'\nimport { addRequestMeta, getRequestMeta } from '../../server/request-meta'\nimport { getTracer, type Span, SpanKind } from '../../server/lib/trace/tracer'\nimport { setManifestsSingleton } from '../../server/app-render/manifests-singleton'\nimport { normalizeAppPath } from '../../shared/lib/router/utils/app-paths'\nimport { NodeNextRequest, NodeNextResponse } from '../../server/base-http/node'\nimport {\n  NextRequestAdapter,\n  signalFromNodeResponse,\n} from '../../server/web/spec-extension/adapters/next-request'\nimport { BaseServerSpan } from '../../server/lib/trace/constants'\nimport { getRevalidateReason } from '../../server/instrumentation/utils'\nimport { sendResponse } from '../../server/send-response'\nimport {\n  fromNodeOutgoingHttpHeaders,\n  toNodeOutgoingHttpHeaders,\n} from '../../server/web/utils'\nimport { getCacheControlHeader } from '../../server/lib/cache-control'\nimport { INFINITE_CACHE, NEXT_CACHE_TAGS_HEADER } from '../../lib/constants'\nimport { NoFallbackError } from '../../shared/lib/no-fallback-error.external'\nimport {\n  CachedRouteKind,\n  type ResponseCacheEntry,\n  type ResponseGenerator,\n} from '../../server/response-cache'\n\nimport * as userland from 'VAR_USERLAND'\n\n// These are injected by the loader afterwards. This is injected as a variable\n// instead of a replacement because this could also be `undefined` instead of\n// an empty string.\ndeclare const nextConfigOutput: AppRouteRouteModuleOptions['nextConfigOutput']\n\n// We inject the nextConfigOutput here so that we can use them in the route\n// module.\n// INJECT:nextConfigOutput\n\nconst routeModule = new AppRouteRouteModule({\n  definition: {\n    kind: RouteKind.APP_ROUTE,\n    page: 'VAR_DEFINITION_PAGE',\n    pathname: 'VAR_DEFINITION_PATHNAME',\n    filename: 'VAR_DEFINITION_FILENAME',\n    bundlePath: 'VAR_DEFINITION_BUNDLE_PATH',\n  },\n  distDir: process.env.__NEXT_RELATIVE_DIST_DIR || '',\n  relativeProjectDir: process.env.__NEXT_RELATIVE_PROJECT_DIR || '',\n  resolvedPagePath: 'VAR_RESOLVED_PAGE_PATH',\n  nextConfigOutput,\n  userland,\n})\n\n// Pull out the exports that we need to expose from the module. This should\n// be eliminated when we've moved the other routes to the new format. These\n// are used to hook into the route.\nconst { workAsyncStorage, workUnitAsyncStorage, serverHooks } = routeModule\n\nfunction patchFetch() {\n  return _patchFetch({\n    workAsyncStorage,\n    workUnitAsyncStorage,\n  })\n}\n\nexport {\n  routeModule,\n  workAsyncStorage,\n  workUnitAsyncStorage,\n  serverHooks,\n  patchFetch,\n}\n\nexport async function handler(\n  req: IncomingMessage,\n  res: ServerResponse,\n  ctx: {\n    waitUntil: (prom: Promise<void>) => void\n  }\n) {\n  if (routeModule.isDev) {\n    addRequestMeta(req, 'devRequestTimingInternalsEnd', process.hrtime.bigint())\n  }\n  let srcPage = 'VAR_DEFINITION_PAGE'\n\n  // turbopack doesn't normalize `/index` in the page name\n  // so we need to to process dynamic routes properly\n  // TODO: fix turbopack providing differing value from webpack\n  if (process.env.TURBOPACK) {\n    srcPage = srcPage.replace(/\\/index$/, '') || '/'\n  } else if (srcPage === '/index') {\n    // we always normalize /index specifically\n    srcPage = '/'\n  }\n  const multiZoneDraftMode = process.env\n    .__NEXT_MULTI_ZONE_DRAFT_MODE as any as boolean\n\n  const prepareResult = await routeModule.prepare(req, res, {\n    srcPage,\n    multiZoneDraftMode,\n  })\n\n  if (!prepareResult) {\n    res.statusCode = 400\n    res.end('Bad Request')\n    ctx.waitUntil?.(Promise.resolve())\n    return null\n  }\n\n  const {\n    buildId,\n    params,\n    nextConfig,\n    parsedUrl,\n    isDraftMode,\n    prerenderManifest,\n    routerServerContext,\n    isOnDemandRevalidate,\n    revalidateOnlyGenerated,\n    resolvedPathname,\n    clientReferenceManifest,\n    serverActionsManifest,\n  } = prepareResult\n\n  const normalizedSrcPage = normalizeAppPath(srcPage)\n\n  let isIsr = Boolean(\n    prerenderManifest.dynamicRoutes[normalizedSrcPage] ||\n      prerenderManifest.routes[resolvedPathname]\n  )\n\n  const render404 = async () => {\n    // TODO: should route-module itself handle rendering the 404\n    if (routerServerContext?.render404) {\n      await routerServerContext.render404(req, res, parsedUrl, false)\n    } else {\n      res.end('This page could not be found')\n    }\n    return null\n  }\n\n  if (isIsr && !isDraftMode) {\n    const isPrerendered = Boolean(prerenderManifest.routes[resolvedPathname])\n    const prerenderInfo = prerenderManifest.dynamicRoutes[normalizedSrcPage]\n\n    if (prerenderInfo) {\n      if (prerenderInfo.fallback === false && !isPrerendered) {\n        if (nextConfig.experimental.adapterPath) {\n          return await render404()\n        }\n        throw new NoFallbackError()\n      }\n    }\n  }\n\n  let cacheKey: string | null = null\n\n  if (isIsr && !routeModule.isDev && !isDraftMode) {\n    cacheKey = resolvedPathname\n    // ensure /index and / is normalized to one key\n    cacheKey = cacheKey === '/index' ? '/' : cacheKey\n  }\n\n  const supportsDynamicResponse: boolean =\n    // If we're in development, we always support dynamic HTML\n    routeModule.isDev === true ||\n    // If this is not SSG or does not have static paths, then it supports\n    // dynamic HTML.\n    !isIsr\n\n  // This is a revalidation request if the request is for a static\n  // page and it is not being resumed from a postponed render and\n  // it is not a dynamic RSC request then it is a revalidation\n  // request.\n  const isStaticGeneration = isIsr && !supportsDynamicResponse\n\n  // Before rendering (which initializes component tree modules), we have to\n  // set the reference manifests to our global store so Server Action's\n  // encryption util can access to them at the top level of the page module.\n  if (serverActionsManifest && clientReferenceManifest) {\n    setManifestsSingleton({\n      page: srcPage,\n      clientReferenceManifest,\n      serverActionsManifest,\n    })\n  }\n\n  const method = req.method || 'GET'\n  const tracer = getTracer()\n  const activeSpan = tracer.getActiveScopeSpan()\n\n  const context: AppRouteRouteHandlerContext = {\n    params,\n    prerenderManifest,\n    renderOpts: {\n      experimental: {\n        authInterrupts: Boolean(nextConfig.experimental.authInterrupts),\n      },\n      cacheComponents: Boolean(nextConfig.cacheComponents),\n      supportsDynamicResponse,\n      incrementalCache: getRequestMeta(req, 'incrementalCache'),\n      cacheLifeProfiles: nextConfig.cacheLife,\n      waitUntil: ctx.waitUntil,\n      onClose: (cb) => {\n        res.on('close', cb)\n      },\n      onAfterTaskError: undefined,\n      onInstrumentationRequestError: (\n        error,\n        _request,\n        errorContext,\n        silenceLog\n      ) =>\n        routeModule.onRequestError(\n          req,\n          error,\n          errorContext,\n          silenceLog,\n          routerServerContext\n        ),\n    },\n    sharedContext: {\n      buildId,\n    },\n  }\n  const nodeNextReq = new NodeNextRequest(req)\n  const nodeNextRes = new NodeNextResponse(res)\n\n  const nextReq = NextRequestAdapter.fromNodeNextRequest(\n    nodeNextReq,\n    signalFromNodeResponse(res)\n  )\n\n  try {\n    const invokeRouteModule = async (span?: Span) => {\n      return routeModule.handle(nextReq, context).finally(() => {\n        if (!span) return\n\n        span.setAttributes({\n          'http.status_code': res.statusCode,\n          'next.rsc': false,\n        })\n\n        const rootSpanAttributes = tracer.getRootSpanAttributes()\n        // We were unable to get attributes, probably OTEL is not enabled\n        if (!rootSpanAttributes) {\n          return\n        }\n\n        if (\n          rootSpanAttributes.get('next.span_type') !==\n          BaseServerSpan.handleRequest\n        ) {\n          console.warn(\n            `Unexpected root span type '${rootSpanAttributes.get(\n              'next.span_type'\n            )}'. Please report this Next.js issue https://github.com/vercel/next.js`\n          )\n          return\n        }\n\n        const route = rootSpanAttributes.get('next.route')\n        if (route) {\n          const name = `${method} ${route}`\n\n          span.setAttributes({\n            'next.route': route,\n            'http.route': route,\n            'next.span_name': name,\n          })\n          span.updateName(name)\n        } else {\n          span.updateName(`${method} ${srcPage}`)\n        }\n      })\n    }\n    const isMinimalMode = Boolean(\n      process.env.MINIMAL_MODE || getRequestMeta(req, 'minimalMode')\n    )\n\n    const handleResponse = async (currentSpan?: Span) => {\n      const responseGenerator: ResponseGenerator = async ({\n        previousCacheEntry,\n      }) => {\n        try {\n          if (\n            !isMinimalMode &&\n            isOnDemandRevalidate &&\n            revalidateOnlyGenerated &&\n            !previousCacheEntry\n          ) {\n            res.statusCode = 404\n            // on-demand revalidate always sets this header\n            res.setHeader('x-nextjs-cache', 'REVALIDATED')\n            res.end('This page could not be found')\n            return null\n          }\n\n          const response = await invokeRouteModule(currentSpan)\n\n          ;(req as any).fetchMetrics = (context.renderOpts as any).fetchMetrics\n          let pendingWaitUntil = context.renderOpts.pendingWaitUntil\n\n          // Attempt using provided waitUntil if available\n          // if it's not we fallback to sendResponse's handling\n          if (pendingWaitUntil) {\n            if (ctx.waitUntil) {\n              ctx.waitUntil(pendingWaitUntil)\n              pendingWaitUntil = undefined\n            }\n          }\n          const cacheTags = context.renderOpts.collectedTags\n\n          // If the request is for a static response, we can cache it so long\n          // as it's not edge.\n          if (isIsr) {\n            const blob = await response.blob()\n\n            // Copy the headers from the response.\n            const headers = toNodeOutgoingHttpHeaders(response.headers)\n\n            if (cacheTags) {\n              headers[NEXT_CACHE_TAGS_HEADER] = cacheTags\n            }\n\n            if (!headers['content-type'] && blob.type) {\n              headers['content-type'] = blob.type\n            }\n\n            const revalidate =\n              typeof context.renderOpts.collectedRevalidate === 'undefined' ||\n              context.renderOpts.collectedRevalidate >= INFINITE_CACHE\n                ? false\n                : context.renderOpts.collectedRevalidate\n\n            const expire =\n              typeof context.renderOpts.collectedExpire === 'undefined' ||\n              context.renderOpts.collectedExpire >= INFINITE_CACHE\n                ? undefined\n                : context.renderOpts.collectedExpire\n\n            // Create the cache entry for the response.\n            const cacheEntry: ResponseCacheEntry = {\n              value: {\n                kind: CachedRouteKind.APP_ROUTE,\n                status: response.status,\n                body: Buffer.from(await blob.arrayBuffer()),\n                headers,\n              },\n              cacheControl: { revalidate, expire },\n            }\n\n            return cacheEntry\n          } else {\n            // send response without caching if not ISR\n            await sendResponse(\n              nodeNextReq,\n              nodeNextRes,\n              response,\n              context.renderOpts.pendingWaitUntil\n            )\n            return null\n          }\n        } catch (err) {\n          // if this is a background revalidate we need to report\n          // the request error here as it won't be bubbled\n          if (previousCacheEntry?.isStale) {\n            const silenceLog = false\n            await routeModule.onRequestError(\n              req,\n              err,\n              {\n                routerKind: 'App Router',\n                routePath: srcPage,\n                routeType: 'route',\n                revalidateReason: getRevalidateReason({\n                  isStaticGeneration,\n                  isOnDemandRevalidate,\n                }),\n              },\n              silenceLog,\n              routerServerContext\n            )\n          }\n          throw err\n        }\n      }\n\n      const cacheEntry = await routeModule.handleResponse({\n        req,\n        nextConfig,\n        cacheKey,\n        routeKind: RouteKind.APP_ROUTE,\n        isFallback: false,\n        prerenderManifest,\n        isRoutePPREnabled: false,\n        isOnDemandRevalidate,\n        revalidateOnlyGenerated,\n        responseGenerator,\n        waitUntil: ctx.waitUntil,\n        isMinimalMode,\n      })\n\n      // we don't create a cacheEntry for ISR\n      if (!isIsr) {\n        return null\n      }\n\n      if (cacheEntry?.value?.kind !== CachedRouteKind.APP_ROUTE) {\n        throw new Error(\n          `Invariant: app-route received invalid cache entry ${cacheEntry?.value?.kind}`\n        )\n      }\n\n      if (!isMinimalMode) {\n        res.setHeader(\n          'x-nextjs-cache',\n          isOnDemandRevalidate\n            ? 'REVALIDATED'\n            : cacheEntry.isMiss\n              ? 'MISS'\n              : cacheEntry.isStale\n                ? 'STALE'\n                : 'HIT'\n        )\n      }\n\n      // Draft mode should never be cached\n      if (isDraftMode) {\n        res.setHeader(\n          'Cache-Control',\n          'private, no-cache, no-store, max-age=0, must-revalidate'\n        )\n      }\n\n      const headers = fromNodeOutgoingHttpHeaders(cacheEntry.value.headers)\n\n      if (!(isMinimalMode && isIsr)) {\n        headers.delete(NEXT_CACHE_TAGS_HEADER)\n      }\n\n      // If cache control is already set on the response we don't\n      // override it to allow users to customize it via next.config\n      if (\n        cacheEntry.cacheControl &&\n        !res.getHeader('Cache-Control') &&\n        !headers.get('Cache-Control')\n      ) {\n        headers.set(\n          'Cache-Control',\n          getCacheControlHeader(cacheEntry.cacheControl)\n        )\n      }\n\n      await sendResponse(\n        nodeNextReq,\n        nodeNextRes,\n        // @ts-expect-error - Argument of type 'Buffer<ArrayBufferLike>' is not assignable to parameter of type 'BodyInit | null | undefined'.\n        new Response(cacheEntry.value.body, {\n          headers,\n          status: cacheEntry.value.status || 200,\n        })\n      )\n      return null\n    }\n\n    // TODO: activeSpan code path is for when wrapped by\n    // next-server can be removed when this is no longer used\n    if (activeSpan) {\n      await handleResponse(activeSpan)\n    } else {\n      await tracer.withPropagatedContext(req.headers, () =>\n        tracer.trace(\n          BaseServerSpan.handleRequest,\n          {\n            spanName: `${method} ${srcPage}`,\n            kind: SpanKind.SERVER,\n            attributes: {\n              'http.method': method,\n              'http.target': req.url,\n            },\n          },\n          handleResponse\n        )\n      )\n    }\n  } catch (err) {\n    if (!(err instanceof NoFallbackError)) {\n      const silenceLog = false\n      await routeModule.onRequestError(\n        req,\n        err,\n        {\n          routerKind: 'App Router',\n          routePath: normalizedSrcPage,\n          routeType: 'route',\n          revalidateReason: getRevalidateReason({\n            isStaticGeneration,\n            isOnDemandRevalidate,\n          }),\n        },\n        silenceLog,\n        routerServerContext\n      )\n    }\n\n    // rethrow so that we can handle serving error page\n\n    // If this is during static generation, throw the error again.\n    if (isIsr) throw err\n\n    // Otherwise, send a 500 ./.next/server/chunks/[root-of-the-server]__2604ca62._.js.map:{"version":3,"sources":["../../../lib/db.js","../../../app/api/debates/generate/route.js","../../../node_modules/next/src/build/templates/app-route.ts"],"sourcesContent":["import { Pool } from 'pg';\n\nconst pool = new Pool({\n  connectionString: process.env.DATABASE_URL,\n});\n\nexport const db = {\n  query: (text, params) => pool.query(text, params),\n  \n  // Generic helper for common operations to mimic some Supabase-like DX if preferred\n  from: (table) => {\n    return {\n      select: async (columns = '*', filters = {}) => {\n        let sql = `SELECT ${columns} FROM ${table}`;\n        const values = [];\n        const filterKeys = Object.keys(filters);\n        \n        if (filterKeys.length > 0) {\n          sql += ' WHERE ' + filterKeys.map((key, i) => {\n            values.push(filters[key]);\n            return `${key} = $${i + 1}`;\n          }).join(' AND ');\n        }\n        \n        const res = await pool.query(sql, values);\n        return { data: res.rows, error: null };\n      },\n      \n      insert: async (row) => {\n        const keys = Object.keys(row);\n        const placeholders = keys.map((_, i) => `$${i + 1}`).join(', ');\n        const sql = `INSERT INTO ${table} (${keys.join(', ')}) VALUES (${placeholders}) RETURNING *`;\n        try {\n          const res = await pool.query(sql, Object.values(row));\n          return { data: res.rows[0], error: null };\n        } catch (e) {\n          return { data: null, error: e };\n        }\n      },\n\n      upsert: async (row, onConflict) => {\n        const keys = Object.keys(row);\n        const placeholders = keys.map((_, i) => `$${i + 1}`).join(', ');\n        const updates = keys.map((key) => `${key} = EXCLUDED.${key}`).join(', ');\n        \n        const sql = `\n          INSERT INTO ${table} (${keys.join(', ')}) \n          VALUES (${placeholders}) \n          ON CONFLICT (${onConflict}) \n          DO UPDATE SET ${updates}\n          RETURNING *`;\n          \n        try {\n          const res = await pool.query(sql, Object.values(row));\n          return { data: res.rows[0], error: null };\n        } catch (e) {\n          return { data: null, error: e };\n        }\n      }\n    };\n  }\n};\n","import { db } from '@/lib/db';\nimport { NextResponse } from 'next/server';\nimport { generateDebate, resetLLMMaster } from '@/lib/llm';\nimport { fetchFeedItems } from '@/lib/rss';\nimport { SETTINGS } from '@/lib/settings';\n\n\nexport async function GET(request) {\n  // Reset failure tracking for this run\n  resetLLMMaster();\n\n  // Optional auth\n  if (process.env.CRON_SECRET) {\n    const authHeader = request.headers.get('Authorization');\n    if (authHeader !== `Bearer ${process.env.CRON_SECRET}`) {\n      return NextResponse.json({ error: 'Unauthorized' }, { status: 401 });\n    }\n  }\n\n  try {\n    // Fetch all agents\n    const agentsRes = await db.query(`SELECT * FROM agents WHERE is_active = true ORDER BY RANDOM() LIMIT 10`);\n    const allAgents = agentsRes.rows;\n\n    if (allAgents.length < 2) {\n      return NextResponse.json({ error: 'Not enough agents to debate' }, { status: 400 });\n    }\n\n    // Pick 2 different agents randomly\n    const agentA = allAgents[0];\n    const agentB = allAgents[1];\n\n    // Fetch a recent article from agentA's feeds\n    const feedsA = typeof agentA.rss_feeds === 'string' \n      ? JSON.parse(agentA.rss_feeds) \n      : agentA.rss_feeds || [];\n\n    let article = null;\n    for (const feed of feedsA.slice(0, 3)) {\n      try {\n        const items = await fetchFeedItems(feed.url, 5);\n        if (items && items.length > 0) {\n          // Pick a random item for variety\n          article = items[Math.floor(Math.random() * items.length)];\n          if (article?.title) break;\n        }\n      } catch (_) {}\n    }\n\n    if (!article?.title) {\n      return NextResponse.json({ error: 'Could not fetch articles for debate' }, { status: 400 });\n    }\n\n    console.log(`[Debate] Generating: ${agentA.name} vs ${agentB.name} on \"${article.title}\"`);\n\n    const debateResult = await generateDebate(agentA, agentB, article);\n\n    const { data: debate, error } = await db.from('debates').insert({\n      topic: article.title,\n      article_title: article.title,\n      article_url: article.link || null,\n      article_image_url: article.imageUrl || null,\n      agent_a_id: agentA.id,\n      agent_b_id: agentB.id,\n      argument_a: debateResult.argument_a,\n      argument_b: debateResult.argument_b,\n      debate_question: debateResult.debate_question || article.title,\n      votes_a: 0,\n      votes_b: 0,\n      tags: ['Debate'],\n      ends_at: new Date(Date.now() + SETTINGS.DEBATE_DURATION_MS).toISOString(),\n    });\n\n\n    if (error) {\n      console.error('[Debate] Insert error:', error);\n      return NextResponse.json({ error: error.message }, { status: 500 });\n    }\n\n    console.log(`[Debate] Successfully created debate: ${debate.id}`);\n    return NextResponse.json({ success: true, debate });\n  } catch (error) {\n    console.error('[Debate] Generation error:', error);\n    return }\n    return null\n  }\n\n  if (isIsr && !isDraftMode) {\n    const isPrerendered = Boolean(prerenderManifest.routes[resolvedPathname])\n    const prerenderInfo = renderOpts: {\n      experimental: {\n        authInterrupts: Boolean(nextConfig.experimental.authInterrupts),\n      },\n      cacheComponents: Boolean(nextConfig.cacheComponents),\n      supportsDynamicResponse,\n      incrementalCache: getRequestMeta(req, 'incrementalCache'),\n      cacheLifeProfiles: nextConfig.cacheLife,\n      waitUntil: ctx.waitUntil,\n      onClose: (cb) => {\n        res.on('close', cb)\n      },\n      onAfterTaskError: undefined,\n      onInstrumentationRequestError: (\n        error,\n        _request,\n        errorContext,\n        silenceLog\n      ) =>\n        routeModule.onRequestError(\n          req,\n          error,\n          errorContext,\n          silenceLog,\n          routerServerContext\n        ),\n    },\n    sharedContext: {\n    signalFromNodeResponse(res)\n  )\n\n  try {\n    const invokeRouteModule = async (span?: Span) => {\n      return routeModule.handle(nextReq, context).finally(() => {\n        if (!span) return\n\n        span.setAttributes({\n          'http.status_code': res.statusCode,\n          'next.rsc': false,\n        })\n\n        const rootSpanAttributes = tracer.getRootSpanAttributes()\n        // We were unable to get attributes, probably OTEL is not enabled\n        if (!rootSpanAttributes) {\n          return\n        }\n\n        if (\n          rootSpanAttributes.get('next.span_type') !==\n          BaseServerSpan.handleRequest\n        ) {\n          console.warn(\n            `Unexpected root span type '${rootSpanAttributes.get(\n              'next.span_type'\n            )}'. Please report this Next.js issue https://github.com/vercel/next.js`\n          )\n          return\n        }\n\n        const route = rootSpanAttributes.get('next.route')\n        if (route) {\n          const name = `${method} ${route}`\n\n          span.setAttributes({\n            'next.route': route,\n            'http.route': route,\n            'next.span_name': name,\n          })\n          span.updateName(name)\n        } else {\n          span.updateName(`${method} ${srcPage}`)\n        }\n      })\n    }\n    const isMinimalMode = Boolean(\n      process.env.MINIMAL_MODE || getRequestMeta(req, 'minimalMode')\n    )\n\n    const handleResponse = async (currentSpan?: Span) => {\n      const responseGenerator: ResponseGenerator = async ({\n        previousCacheEntry,\n      }) => {\n        try {\n          if (\n            !isMinimalMode &&\n            isOnDemandRevalidate &&\n            revalidateOnlyGenerated &&\n            !previousCacheEntry\n          ) {\n            res.statusCode = 404\n            // on-demand revalidate always sets this header\n            res.setHeader('x-nextjs-cache', 'REVALIDATED')\n            res.end('This page could not be found')\n            return null\n          }\n\n          const response = await invokeRouteModule(currentSpan)\n\n          ;(req as any).fetchMetrics = (context.renderOpts as any).fetchMetrics\n          let pendingWaitUntil = context.renderOpts.pendingWaitUntil\n\n          // Attempt using provided waitUntil if available\n          // if it's not we fallback to sendResponse's handling\n          if (pendingWaitUntil) {\n            if (ctx.waitUntil) {\n              ctx.waitUntil(pendingWaitUntil)\n              pendingWaitUntil = undefined\n            }\n          }\n          const cacheTags = context.renderOpts.collectedTags\n\n          // If the request is for a static response, we can cache it so long\n          // as it's not edge.\n          if (isIsr) {\n            const blob = await response.blob()\n\n            // Copy the headers from the response.\n            const headers = toNodeOutgoingHttpHeaders(response.headers)\n\n            if (cacheTags) {\n              headers[NEXT_CACHE_TAGS_HEADER] = cacheTags\n            }\n\n            if (!headers['content-type'] && blob.type) {\n              headers['content-type'] = blob.type\n            }\n\n            const revalidate =\n              typeof context.renderOpts.collectedRevalidate === 'undefined' ||\n              context.renderOpts.collectedRevalidate >= INFINITE_CACHE\n                ? false\n                : context.renderOpts.collectedRevalidate\n\n            const expire =\n              typeof context.renderOpts.collectedExpire === 'undefined' ||\n              context.renderOpts.collectedExpire >= INFINITE_CACHE\n                ? undefined\n                : context.renderOpts.collectedExpire\n\n            // Create the cache entry for the response.\n            const cacheEntry: ResponseCacheEntry = {\n              value: {\n                kind: CachedRouteKind.APP_ROUTE,\n                status: response.status,\n                body: Buffer.from(await blob.arrayBuffer()),\n                headers,\n              },\n              cacheControl: { revalidate, expire },\n            }\n\n            return cacheEntry\n          } else {\n            // send response without caching if not ISR\n            await sendResponse(\n              nodeNextReq,\n              nodeNextRes,\n              response,\n              context.renderOpts.pendingWaitUntil\n            )\n            return null\n          }\n        } catch (err) {\n          // if this is a background revalidate we need to report\n          // the request error here as it won't be bubbled\n          if (previousCacheEntry?.isStale) {\n            const silenceLog = false\n            await routeModule.onRequestError(\n              req,\n              err,\n              {\n                routerKind: 'App Router',\n                routePath: srcPage,\n                routeType: 'route',\n                revalidateReason: getRevalidateReason({\n                  isStaticGeneration,\n                  isOnDemandRevalidate,\n                }),\n              },\n              silenceLog,\n              routerServerContext\n            )\n          }\n          throw err\n        }\n      }\n\n      const cacheEntry = await routeModule.handleResponse({\n        req,\n        nextConfig,\n        cacheKey,\n        routeKind: RouteKind.APP_ROUTE,\n        isFallback: false,\n        prerenderManifest,\n        isRoutePPREnabled: false,\n        isOnDemandRevalidate,\n        revalidateOnlyGenerated,\n        responseGenerator,\n        waitUntil: ctx.waitUntil,\n        isMinimalMode,\n      })\n\n      // we don't create a cacheEntry for ISR\n      if (!isIsr) {\n        return null\n      }\n\n      if (cacheEntry?.value?.kind !== CachedRouteKind.APP_ROUTE) {\n        throw new Error(\n          `Invariant: app-route received invalid cache entry ${cacheEntry?.value?.kind}`\n        )\n      }\n\n      if (!isMinimalMode) {\n        res.setHeader(\n          'x-nextjs-cache',\n          isOnDemandRevalidate\n            ? 'REVALIDATED'\n            : cacheEntry.isMiss\n              ? 'MISS'\n              : cacheEntry.isStale\n                ? 'STALE'\n                : 'HIT'\n        )\n      }\n\n      // Draft mode should never be cached\n      if (isDraftMode) {\n        res.setHeader(\n          'Cache-Control',\n          'private, no-cache, no-store, max-age=0, must-revalidate'\n        )\n      }\n\n      const headers = fromNodeOutgoingHttpHeaders(cacheEntry.value.headers)\n\n      if (!(isMinimalMode && isIsr)) {\n        headers.delete(NEXT_CACHE_TAGS_HEADER)\n      }\n\n      // If cache control is already set on the response we don't\n      // override it to allow users to customize it via next.config\n      if (\n        cacheEntry.cacheControl &&\n        !res.getHeader('Cache-Control') &&\n        !headers.get('Cache-Control')\n      ) {\n        headers.set(\n          'Cache-Control',\n          getCacheControlHeader(cacheEntry.cacheControl)\n        )\n      }\n\n      await sendResponse(\n        nodeNextReq,\n        nodeNextRes,\n        // @ts-expect-error - Argument of type 'Buffer<ArrayBufferLike>' is not assignable to parameter of type 'BodyInit | null | undefined'.\n        new Response(cacheEntry.value.body, {\n          headers,\n          status: cacheEntry.value.status || 200,\n        })\n      )\n      return null\n    }\n\n    // TODO: activeSpan code path is for when wrapped by\n    // next-server can be removed when this is no longer used\n    if (activeSpan) {\n      await handleResponse(activeSpan)\n    } else {\n      await tracer.withPropagatedContext(req.headers, () =>\n        tracer.trace(\n          BaseServerSpan.handleRequest,\n          {\n            spanName: `${method} ${srcPage}`,\n            kind: SpanKind.SERVER,\n            attributes: {\n              'http.method': method,\n              'http.target': req.url,\n            },\n          },\n          handleResponse\n        )\n      )\n    }\n  } catch (err) {\n    if (!(err instanceof NoFallbackError)) {\n      const silenceLog = false\n      await routeModule.onRequestError(\n        req,\n        err,\n        {\n          routerKind: 'App Router',\n          routePath: normalizedSrcPage,\n          routeType: 'route',\n          revalidateReason: getRevalidateReason({\n            isStaticGeneration,\n            isOnDemandRevalidate,\n          }),\n        },\n        silenceLog,\n        routerServerContext\n      )\n    }\n\n    // rethrow so that we can handle serving error page\n\n    // If this is during static generation, throw the error again.\n    if (isIsr) throw err\n\n    // Otherwise, send a 500 response.\n    await sendResponse(\n      nodeNextReq,\n      nodeNextRes,\n      new Response(null, { status: 500 })\n    )\n    return null\n { Pool } from 'pg';\n\nconst pool = new Pool({\n  connectionString: process.env.DATABASE_URL,\n});\n\nexport const db = {\n  query: (text, params) => pool.query(text, params),\n  \n  // Generic helper for common operations to mimic some Supabase-like DX if preferred\n  from: (table) => {\n    return {\n      select: async (columns = '*', filters = {}) => {\n        let sql = `SELECT ${columns} FROM ${table}`;\n        const values = [];\n        const filterKeys = Object.keys(filters);\n        \n        if (filterKeys.length > 0) {\n          sql += ' WHERE ' + filterKeys.map((key, i) => {\n            values.push(filters[key]);\n            return `${key} = $${i + 1}`;\n          }).join(' AND ');\n        }\n        \n        const res = await pool.query(sql, values);\n        return { data: res.rows, error: null };\n      },\n      \n      insert: async (row) => {\n        const keys = Object.keys(row);\n        const placeholders = keys.map((_, i) => `$${i + 1}`).join(', ');\n        const sql = `INSERT INTO ${table} (${keys.join(', ')}) VALUES (${placeholders}) RETURNING *`;\n        try {\n          const res = await pool.query(sql, Object.values(row));\n          return { data: res.rows[0], error: null };\n        } catch (e) {\n          return { data: null, error: e };\n        }\n      },\n\n      upsert: async (row, onConflict) => {\n        const keys = Object.keys(row);\n        const placeholders = keys.map((_, i) => `$${i + 1}`).join(', ');\n        const updates = keys.map((key) => `${key} = EXCLUDED.${key}`).join(', ');\n        \n        const sql = `\n          INSERT INTO ${table} (${keys.join(', ')}) \n          VALUES (${placeholders}) \n          ON CONFLICT (${onConflict}) \n          DO UPDATE SET ${updates}\n          RETURNING *`;\n          \n        try {\n          const res = await pool.query(sql, Object.values(row));\n          return { data: res.rows[0], error: null };\n        } catch (e) {\n          return { data:          'follower_count', a.follower_count\n           ) as agent,\n           (SELECT count(*) FROM comments c WHERE c.post_id = p.id)::int as comments_count,\n           (SELECT reaction_type FROM post_reactions pr WHERE pr.post_id = p.id AND pr.user_id = $1) as user_reaction\n    FROM posts p\n    JOIN agents a ON p.agent_id = a.id\n  `;\n\n  const values = [user?.id || null];\n  const conditions = [];\n\n  if (agent_slug && agent_slug !== 'All') {\n    values.push(agent_slug);\n    conditions.push(`a.slug = $${values.length}`);\n  } else if (user) {\n    // Feed optimization: Only show posts from followed agents when on main feed\n    conditions.push(`EXISTS (SELECT 1 FROM user_follows uf WHERE uf.user_id = $1 AND uf.agent_id = a.id)`);\n  }\n\n  if (topic) {\n    values.push(topic);\n    conditions.push(`a.topic = $${values.length}`);\n  }\n\n  if (tag) {\n    const cleanTag = tag.startsWith('#') ? tag.slice(1) : tag;\n    values.push(cleanTag);\n    conditions.push(`$${values.length} = ANY(p.tags)`);\n  }\n  \n  if (type) {\n    values.push(type);\n    conditions.push(`p.type = $${values.length}`);\n  }\n\n  if (conditions.length > 0) {\n    sql += ` WHERE ` + conditions.join(' AND ');\n  }\n\n  sql += ` \n    ORDER BY \n      date_trunc('hour', p.created_at) DESC, \n      row_number() OVER (PARTITION BY p.agent_id, date_trunc('hour', p.created_at) ORDER BY p.created_at DESC) ASC,\n      p.created_at DESC \n    LIMIT $${values.length + 1} OFFSET $${values.length + 2}`;\n  values.push(limit, offset);\n\n  try {\n    const res = await db.query(sql, values);\n    return NextResponse.json(res.rows);\n  } catch (error) {\n    console.error('API Error:', error);\n    return NextResponse.json({ error: error.message }, { status: 500 });\n  }\n}\n","import {\n  AppRouteRouteModule,\n  type AppRouteRouteHandlerContext,\n  type AppRouteRouteModuleOptions,\n} from '../../server/route-modules/app-route/module.compiled'\nimport { RouteKind } from '../../server/route-kind'\nimport { patchFetch as _patchFetch } from '../../server/lib/patch-fetch'\nimport type { IncomingMessage, ServerResponse } from 'node:http'\nimport { addRequestMeta, getRequestMeta } from '../../server/request-meta'\nimport { getTracer, type Span, SpanKind } from '../../server/lib/trace/tracer'\nimport { setManifestsSingleton } from '../../server/app-render/manifests-singleton'\nimport { normalizeAppPath } from '../../shared/lib/router/utils/app-paths'\nimport { NodeNextRequest, NodeNextResponse } from '../../server/base-http/node'\nimport {\n  NextRequestAdapter,\n  signalFromNodeResponse,\n} from '../../server/web/spec-extension/adapters/next-request'\nimport { BaseServerSpan } from '../../server/lib/trace/constants'\nimport { getRevalidateReason } from '../../server/instrumentation/utils'\nimport { sendResponse } from '../../server/send-response'\nimport {\n  fromNodeOutgoingHttpHeaders,\n  toNodeOutgoingHttpHeaders,\n} from '../../server/web/utils'\nimport { getCacheControlHeader } from '../../server/lib/cache-control'\nimport { INFINITE_CACHE, NEXT_CACHE_TAGS_HEADER } from '../../lib/constants'\nimport { NoFallbackError } from '../../shared/lib/no-fallback-error.external'\nimport {\n  CachedRouteKind,\n  type ResponseCacheEntry,\n  type ResponseGenerator,\n} from '../../server/response-cache'\n\nimport * as userland from 'VAR_USERLAND'\n\n// These are injected by the loader afterwards. This is injected as a variable\n// instead of a replacement because this could also be `undefined` instead of\n// an empty string.\ndeclare const nextConfigOutput: AppRouteRouteModuleOptions['nextConfigOutput']\n\n// We inject the nextConfigOutput here so that we can use them in the route\n// module.\n// INJECT:nextConfigOutput\n\nconst routeModule = new AppRouteRouteModule({\n  definition: {\n    kind: RouteKind.APP_ROUTE,\n    page: 'VAR_DEFINITION_PAGE',\n    pathname: 'VAR_DEFINITION_PATHNAME',\n    filename: 'VAR_DEFINITION_FILENAME',\n    bundlePath: 'VAR_DEFINITION_BUNDLE_PATH',\n  },\n  distDir: process.env.__NEXT_RELATIVE_DIST_DIR || '',\n  relativeProjectDir: process.env.__NEXT_RELATIVE_PROJECT_DIR || '',\n  resolvedPagePath: 'VAR_RESOLVED_PAGE_PATH',\n  nextConfigOutput,\n  userland,\n})\n\n// Pull out the exports that we need to expose from the module. This should\n// be eliminated when we've moved the other routes to the new format. These\n// are used to hook into the route.\nconst { workAsyncStorage, workUnitAsyncStorage, serverHooks } = routeModule\n\nfunction patchFetch() {\n  return _patchFetch({\n    workAsyncStorage,\n    workUnitAsyncStorage,\n  })\n}\n\nexport {\n  routeModule,\n  workAsyncStorage,\n  workUnitAsyncStorage,\n  serverHooks,\n  patchFetch,\n}\n\nexport async function handler(\n  req: IncomingMessage,\n  res: ServerResponse,\n  ctx: {\n    waitUntil: (prom: Promise<void>) => void\n  }\n) {\n  if (routeModule.isDev) {\n    addRequestMeta(req, 'devRequestTimingInternalsEnd', process.hrtime.bigint())\n  }\n  let srcPage = 'VAR_DEFINITION_PAGE'\n\n  // turbopack doesn't normalize `/index` in the page name\n  // so we need to to process dynamic routes properly\n  // TODO: fix turbopack providing differing value from webpack\n  if (process.env.TURBOPACK) {\n    srcPage = srcPage.replace(/\\/index$/, '') || '/'\n  } else if (srcPage === '/index') {\n    // we always normalize /index specifically\n    srcPage = '/'\n  }\n  const multiZoneDraftMode = process.env\n    .__NEXT_MULTI_ZONE_DRAFT_MODE as any as boolean\n\n  const prepareResult = await routeModule.prepare(req, res, {\n    srcPage,\n    multiZoneDraftMode,\n  })\n\n  if (!prepareResult) {\n    res.statusCode = 400\n    res.end('Bad Request')\n    ctx.waitUntil?.(Promise.resolve())\n    return null\n  }\n\n  const {\n    buildId,\n    params,\n    nextConfig,\n    parsedUrl,\n    isDraftMode,\n    prerenderManifest,\n    routerServerContext,\n    isOnDemandRevalidate,\n    revalidateOnlyGenerated,\n    resolvedPathname,\n    clientReferenceManifest,\n    serverActionsManifest,\n  } = prepareResult\n\n  const normalizedSrcPage = normalizeAppPath(srcPage)\n\n  let isIsr = Boolean(\n    prerenderManifest.dynamicRoutes[normalizedSrcPage] ||\n      prerenderManifest.routes[resolvedPathname]\n  )\n\n  const render404 = async () => {\n    // TODO: should route-module itself handle rendering the 404\n    if (routerServerContext?.render404) {\n      await routerServerContext.render404(req, res, parsedUrl, false)\n    } else {\n      res.end('This page could not be found')\n    }\n    return null\n  }\n\n  if (isIsr && !isDraftMode) {\n    const isPrerendered = Boolean(prerenderManifest.routes[resolvedPathname])\n    const prerenderInfo = prerenderManifest.dynamicRoutes[normalizedSrcPage]\n\n    if (prerenderInfo) {\n      if (prerenderInfo.fallback === false && !isPrerendered) {\n        if (nextConfig.experimental.adapterPath) {\n          return await render404()\n        }\n        throw new NoFallbackError()\n      }\n    }\n  }\n\n  let cacheKey: string | null = null\n\n  if (isIsr && !routeModule.isDev && !isDraftMode) {\n    cacheKey = resolvedPathname\n    // ensure /index and / is normalized to one key\n    cacheKey = cacheKey === '/index' ? '/' : cacheKey\n  }\n\n  const supportsDynamicResponse: boolean =\n    // If we're in development, we always support dynamic HTML\n    routeModule.isDev === true ||\n    // If this is not SSG or does not have static paths, then it supports\n    // dynamic HTML.\n    !isIsr\n\n  // This is a revalidation request if the request is for a static\n  // page and it is not being resumed from a postponed render and\n  // it is not a dynamic RSC request then it is a revalidation\n  // request.\n  const isStaticGeneration = isIsr && !supportsDynamicResponse\n\n  // Before rendering (which initializes component tree modules), we have to\n  // set the reference manifests to our global store so Server Action's\n  // encryption util can access to them at the top level of the page module.\n  if (serverActionsManifest && clientReferenceManifest) {\n    setManifestsSingleton({\n      page: srcPage,\n      clientReferenceManifest,\n      serverActionsManifest,\n    })\n  }\n\n  const method = req.method || 'GET'\n  const tracer = getTracer()\n  const activeSpan = tracer.getActiveScopeSpan()\n\n  const context: AppRouteRouteHandlerContext = {\n    params,\n    prerenderManifest,\n    renderOpts: {\n      experimental: {\n        authInterrupts: Boolean(nextConfig.experimental.authInterrupts),\n      },\n      cacheComponents: Boolean(nextConfig.cacheComponents),\n      supportsDynamicResponse,\n      incrementalCache: getRequestMeta(req, 'incrementalCache'),\n      cacheLifeProfiles: nextConfig.cacheLife,\n      waitUntil: ctx.waitUntil,\n      onClose: (cb) => {\n        res.on('close', cb)\n      },\n      onAfterTaskError: undefined,\n      onInstrumentationRequestError: (\n        error,\n        _request,\n        errorContext,\n        silenceLog\n      ) =>\n        routeModule.onRequestError(\n          req,\n          error,\n          errorContext,\n          silenceLog,\n          routerServerContext\n        ),\n    },\n    sharedContext: {\n      buildId,\n    },\n  }\n  const nodeNextReq = new NodeNextRequest(req)\n  const nodeNextRes = new NodeNextResponse(res)\n\n  const nextReq = NextRequestAdapter.fromNodeNextRequest(\n    nodeNextReq,\n    signalFromNodeResponse(res)\n  )\n\n  try {\n    const invokeRouteModule = async (span?: Span) => {\n      return routeModule.handle(nextReq, context).finally(() => {\n        if (!span) return\n\n        span.setAttributes({\n          'http.status_code': res.statusCode,\n          'next.rsc': false,\n        })\n\n        const rootSpanAttributes = tracer.getRootSpanAttributes()\n        // We were unable to get attributes, probably OTEL is not enabled\n        if (!rootSpanAttributes) {\n          return\n        }\n\n        if (\n          rootSpanAttributes.get('next.span_type') !==\n          BaseServerSpan.handleRequest\n        ) {\n          console.warn(\n            `Unexpected root span type '${rootSpanAttributes.get(\n              'next.span_type'\n            )}'. Please report this Next.js issue https://github.com/vercel/next.js`\n          )\n          return\n        }\n\n        const route = rootSpanAttributes.get('next.route')\n        if (route) {\n          const name = `${method} ${route}`\n\n          span.setAttributes({\n            'next.route': route,\n            'http.route': route,\n            'next.span_name': name,\n          })\n          span.updateName(name)\n        } else {\n          span.updateName(`${method} ${srcPage}`)\n        }\n      })\n    }\n    const isMinimalMode = Boolean(\n      process.env.MINIMAL_MODE || getRequestMeta(req, 'minimalMode')\n    )\n\n    const handleResponse = async (currentSpan?: Span) => {\n      const responseGenerator: ResponseGenerator = async ({\n        previousCacheEntry,\n      }) => {\n        try {\n          if (\n            !isMinimalMode &&\n            isOnDemandRevalidate &&\n            revalidateOnlyGenerated &&\n            !previousCacheEntry\n          ) {\n            res.statusCode = 404\n            // on-demand revalidate always sets this header\n            res.setHeader('x-nextjs-cache', 'REVALIDATED')\n            res.end('This page could not be found')\n            return null\n          }\n\n          const response = await invokeRouteModule(currentSpan)\n\n          ;(req as any).fetchMetrics = (context.renderOpts as any).fetchMetrics\n          let pendingWaitUntil = context.renderOpts.pendingWaitUntil\n\n          // Attempt using provided waitUntil if available\n          // if it's not we fallback to sendResponse's handling\n          if (pendingWaitUntil) {\n            if (ctx.waitUntil) {\n              ctx.waitUntil(pendingWaitUntil)\n              pendingWaitUntil = undefined\n            }\n          }\n          const cacheTags = context.renderOpts.collectedTags\n\n          // If the request is for a static response, we can cache it so long\n          // as it's not edge.\n          if (isIsr) {\n            const blob = await response.blob()\n\n            // Copy the headers from the response.\n            const headers = toNodeOutgoingHttpHeaders(response.headers)\n\n            if (cacheTags) {\n              headers[NEXT_CACHE_TAGS_HEADER] = cacheTags\n            }\n\n            if (!headers['content-type'] && blob.type) {\n              headers['content-type'] = blob.type\n            }\n\n            const revalidate =\n              typeof context.renderOpts.collectedRevalidate === 'undefined' ||\n              context.renderOpts.collectedRevalidate >= INFINITE_CACHE\n                ? false\n                : context.renderOpts.collectedRevalidate\n\n            const expire =\n              typeof context.renderOpts.collectedExpire === 'undefined' ||\n              context.renderOpts.collectedExpire >= INFINITE_CACHE\n                ? undefined\n                : context.renderOpts.collectedExpire\n\n            // Create the cache entry for the response.\n            const cacheEntry: ResponseCacheEntry = {\n              value: {\n                kind: CachedRouteKind.APP_ROUTE,\n                status: response.status,\n                body: Buffer.from(await blob.arrayBuffer()),\n                headers,\n              },\n              cacheControl: { revalidate, expire },\n            }\n\n            return cacheEntry\n          } else {\n            // send response without caching if not ISR\n            await sendResponse(\n              nodeNextReq,\n              nodeNextRes,\n              response,\n              context.renderOpts.pendingWaitUntil\n            )\n            return null\n          }\n        } catch (err) {\n          // if this is a background revalidate we need to report\n          // the request error here as it won't be bubbled\n          if (previousCacheEntry?.isStale) {\n            const silenceLog = false\n            await routeModule.onRequestError(\n              req,\n              err,\n              {\n                routerKind: 'App Router',\n                routePath: srcPage,\n                routeType: 'route',\n                revalidateReason: getRevalidateReason({\n                  isStaticGeneration,\n                  isOnDemandRevalidate,\n                }),\n              },\n              silenceLog,\n              routerServerContext\n            )\n          }\n          throw err\n        }\n      }\n\n      const cacheEntry = await routeModule.handleResponse({\n        req,\n        nextConfig,\n        cacheKey,\n        routeKind: RouteKind.APP_ROUTE,\n        isFallback: false,\n        prerenderManifest,\n        isRoutePPREnabled: false,\n        isOnDemandRevalidate,\n        revalidateOnlyGenerated,\n        responseGenerator,\n        waitUntil: ctx.waitUntil,\n        isMinimalMode,\n      })\n\n      // we don't create a cacheEntry for ISR\n      if (!isIsr) {\n        return null\n      }\n\n      if (cacheEntry?.value?.kind !== CachedRouteKind.APP_ROUTE) {\n        throw new Error(\n          `Invariant: app-route received invalid cache entry ${cacheEntry?.value?.kind}`\n        )\n      }\n\n      if (!isMinimalMode) {\n        res.setHeader(\n          'x-nextjs-cache',\n          isOnDemandRevalidate\n            ? 'REVALIDATED'\n            : cacheEntry.isMiss\n              ? 'MISS'\n              : cacheEntry.isStale\n                ? 'STALE'\n                : 'HIT'\n        )\n      }\n\n      // Draft mode should never be cached\n      if (isDraftMode) {\n        res.setHeader(\n          'Cache-Control',\n          'private, no-cache, no-store, max-age=0, must-revalidate'\n        )\n      }\n\n      const headers = fromNodeOutgoingHttpHeaders(cacheEntry.value.headers)\n\n      if (!(isMinimalMode && isIsr)) {\n        headers.delete(NEXT_CACHE_TAGS_HEADER)\n      }\n\n      // If cache control is already set on the response we don't\n      // override it to allow users to customize it via next.config\n      if (\n        cacheEntry.cacheControl &&\n        !res.getHeader('Cache-Control') &&\n        !headers.get('Cache-Control')\n      ) {\n        headers.set(\n          'Cache-Control',\n          getCacheControlHeader(cacheEntry.cacheControl)\n        )\n      }\n\n      await sendResponse(\n        nodeNextReq,\n        nodeNextRes,\n        // @ts-expect-error - Argument of type 'Buffer<ArrayBufferLike>' is not assignable to parameter of type 'BodyInit | null | undefined'.\n        new Response(cacheEntry.value.body, {\n          headers,\n          status: cacheEntry.value.status || 200,\n        })\n      )\n      return null\n    }\n\n    // TODO: activeSpan code path is for when wrapped by\n    // next-server can be removed when this is no longer used\n    if (activeSpan) {\n      await handleResponse(activeSpan)\n    } else {\n      await tracer.withPropagatedContext(req.headers, () =>\n        tracer.trace(\n          BaseServerSpan.handleRequest,\n          {\n            spanName: `${method} ${srcPage}`,\n            kind: SpanKind.SERVER,\n            attributes: {\n              'http.method': method,\n              'http.target': req.url,\n            },\n          },\n          handleResponse\n        )\n      )\n    }\n  } catch (err) {\n    if (!(err instanceof NoFallbackError)) {\n      const silenceLog = false\n      await routeModule.onRequestError(\n        req,\n        err,\n        {\n          routerKind: 'App Router',\n          routePath: normalizedSrcPage,\n          routeType: 'route',\n          revalidateReason: getRevalidateReason({\n            isStaticGeneration,\n            isOnDemandRevalidate,\n          }),\n        },\n        silenceLog,\n        routerServerContext\n      )\n    }\n\n    // rethrow so that we can handle serving error page\n\n    // If this is during static generation, throw the error again.\n    if (isIsr) throw err\n\n    // Otherwise, send a 500 response.\n    await sendResponse(\n      nodeNextReq,\n      nodeNextRes,\n      new Response(null, { status: 500 })\n    )\n    return null\n {"version":3,"sources":["file:///Users/igalemona/repos/FeedSphere/feedsphere/lib/db.js"],"sourcesContent":["import { Pool } from 'pg';\n\nconst pool = new Pool({\n  connectionString: process.env.DATABASE_URL,\n});\n\nexport const db = {\n  query: (text, params) => pool.query(text, params),\n  \n  // Generic helper for common operations to mimic some Supabase-like DX if preferred\n  from: (table) => {\n    return {\n      select: async (columns = '*', filters = {}) => {\n        let sql = `SELECT ${columns} FROM ${table}`;\n        const values = [];\n        const filterKeys = Object.keys(filters);\n        \n        if (filterKeys.length > 0) {\n          sql += ' WHERE ' + filterKeys.map((key, i) => {\n            values.push(filters[key]);\n            return `${key} = $${i + 1}`;\n          }).join(' AND ');\n        }\n        \n        const res = await pool.query(sql, values);\n        return { data: res.rows, error: null };\n      },\n      \n      insert: async (row) => {\n        const keys = Object.keys(row);\n        const placeholders = keys.map((_, i) => `$${i + 1}`).join(', ');\n        const sql = `INSERT INTO ${table} (${keys.join(', ')}) VALUES (${placeholders}) RETURNING *`;\n        try {\n          const res = await pool.query(sql, Object.values(row));\n          return { data: res.rows[0], error: null };\n        } catch (e) {\n          return { data: null, error: e };\n        }\n      },\n\n      upsert: async (row, onConflict) => {\n        const keys = Object.keys(row);\n        const placeholders = keys.map((_, i) => `$${i + 1}`).join(', ');\n        const updates = keys.map((key) => `${key} = EXCLUDED.${key}`).join(', ');\n        \n        const sql = `\n          INSERT INTO ${table} (${keys.join(', ')}) \n          VALUES (${placeholders}) \n          ON CONFLICT (${onConflict}) \n          DO UPDATE SET ${updates}\n          RETURNING *`;\n          \n        try {\n          const res = await pool.query(sql, Object.values(row));\n          return { data: res.rows[0], error: null };\n        } catch (e) {\n          return { data: null, error: e };\n        }\n      }\n    };\n  }\n};\n"],"names":[],"mappings":";;;;AAAA;;;;;;AAEA,MAAM,OAAO,IAAI,qJAAI,CAAC;IACpB,kBAAkB,QAAQ,GAAG,CAAC,YAAY;AAC5C;AAEO,MAAM,KAAK;IAChB,OAAO,CAAC,MAAM,SAAW,KAAK,KAAK,CAAC,MAAM;IAE1C,mFAAmF;IACnF,MAAM,CAAC;QACL,OAAO;YACL,QAAQ,OAAO,UAAU,GAAG,EAAE,UAAU,CAAC,CAAC;gBACxC,IAAI,MAAM,CAAC,OAAO,EAAE,QAAQ,MAAM,EAAE,OAAO;gBAC3C,MAAM,SAAS,EAAE;gBACjB,MAAM,aAAa,OAAO,IAAI,CAAC;gBAE/B,IAAI,WAAW,MAAM,GAAG,GAAG;oBACzB,OAAO,YAAY,WAAW,GAAG,CAAC,CAAC,KAAK;wBACtC,OAAO,IAAI,CAAC,OAAO,CAAC,IAAI;wBACxB,OAAO,GAAG,IAAI,IAAI,EAAE,IAAI,GAAG;oBAC7B,GAAG,IAAI,CAAC;gBACV;gBAEA,MAAM,MAAM,MAAM,KAAK,KAAK,CAAC,KAAK;gBAClC,OAAO;oBAAE,MAAM,IAAI,IAAI;oBAAE,OAAO;gBAAK;YACvC;YAEA,QAAQ,OAAO;gBACb,MAAM,OAAO,OAAO,IAAI,CAAC;gBACzB,MAAM,eAAe,KAAK,GAAG,CAAC,CAAC,GAAG,IAAM,CAAC,CAAC,EAAE,IAAI,GAAG,EAAE,IAAI,CAAC;gBAC1D,MAAM,MAAM,CAAC,YAAY,EAAE,MAAM,EAAE,EAAE,KAAK,IAAI,CAAC,MAAM,UAAU,EAAE,aAAa,aAAa,CAAC;gBAC5F,IAAI;oBACF,MAAM,MAAM,MAAM,KAAK,KAAK,CAAC,KAAK,OAAO,MAAM,CAAC;oBAChD,OAAO;wBAAE,MAAM,IAAI,IAAI,CAAC,EAAE;wBAAE,OAAO;oBAAK;gBAC1C,EAAE,OAAO,GAAG;oBACV,OAAO;wBAAE,MAAM;wBAAM,OAAO;oBAAE;gBAChC;YACF;YAEA,QAAQ,OAAO,KAAK;gBAClB,MAAM,OAAO,OAAO,IAAI,CAAC;gBACzB,MAAM,eAAe,KAAK,GAAG,CAAC,CAAC,GAAG,IAAM,CAAC,CAAC,EAAE,IAAI,GAAG,EAAE,IAAI,CAAC;gBAC1D,MAAM,UAAU,KAAK,GAAG,CAAC,CAAC,MAAQ,GAAG,IAAI,YAAY,EAAE,KAAK,EAAE,IAAI,CAAC;gBAEnE,MAAM,MAAM,CAAC;sBACC,EAAE,MAAM,EAAE,EAAE,KAAK,IAAI,CAAC,MAAM;kBAChC,EAAE,aAAa;uBACV,EAAE,WAAW;wBACZ,EAAE,QAAQ;qBACb,CAAC;gBAEd,IAAI;oBACF,MAAM,MAAM,MAAM,KAAK,KAAK,CAAC,KAAK,OAAO,MAAM,CAAC;oBAChD,OAAO;wBAAE,MAAM,IAAI,IAAI,CAAC,EAAE;wBAAE,OAAO;oBAAK;gBAC1C,EAAE,OAAO,GAAG;oBACV,OAAO;wBAAE,MAAM;wBAAM,OAAO;oBAAE;gBAChC;YACF;QACF;IACF;AACF"}},

./.next/dev/server/chunks/[root-of-the-server]__814cbca0._.js.map:    {"offset": {"line": 132, "column": 0}, "map": {"version":3,"sources":["file:///Users/igalemona/repos/FeedSphere/feedsphere/app/api/debates/%5BdebateId%5D/vote/route.js"],"sourcesContent":["import { db } from '@/lib/db';\nimport { NextResponse } from 'next/server';\n\nexport async function POST(request, { params }) {\n  const { debateId } = await params;\n  \n  try {\n    const { side, sessionId } = await request.json();\n\n    if (!['a', 'b'].includes(side)) {\n      return NextResponse.json({ error: 'Invalid side' }, { status: 400 });\n    }\n    if (!sessionId) {\n      return NextResponse.json({ error: 'Missing sessionId' }, { status: 400 });\n    }\n\n    // Check if already voted\n    const existingVote = await db.query(\n      `SELECT voted_for FROM debate_votes WHERE debate_id = $1 AND session_id = $2`,\n      [debateId, sessionId]\n    );\n\n    if (existingVote.rows.length > 0) {\n      // Return current counts without changing\n      const current = await db.query(\n        `SELECT votes_a, votes_b FROM debates WHERE id = $1`,\n        [debateId]\n      );\n      return NextResponse.json({ \n        ...current.rows[0], \n        already_voted: true,\n        voted_for: existingVote.rows[0].voted_for\n      });\n    }\n\n    // Record the vote\n    await db.query(\n      `INSERT INTO debate_votes (debate_id, session_id, voted_for) VALUES ($1, $2, $3)`,\n      [debateId, sessionId, side]\n    );\n\n    // Increment the vote count\n    const voteCol = side === 'a' ? 'votes_a' : 'votes_b';\n    const result = await db.query(\n      `UPDATE debates SET ${voteCol} = ${voteCol} + 1 WHERE id = $1 RETURNING votes_a, votes_b`,\n      [debateId]\n    );\n\n    return NextResponse.json({ ...result.rows[0], already_voted: false, voted_for: side });\n  } catch (error) {\n    console.error('Vote API Error:', error);\n    return NextResponse.json({ error: error.message }, { status: 500 });\n  }\n}\n"],"names":[],"mappings":";;;;AAAA;AACA;;;;;;;AAEO,eAAe,KAAK,OAAO,EAAE,EAAE,MAAM,EAAE;IAC5C,MAAM,EAAE,QAAQ,EAAE,GAAG,MAAM;IAE3B,IAAI;QACF,MAAM,EAAE,IAAI,EAAE,SAAS,EAAE,GAAG,MAAM,QAAQ,IAAI;QAE9C,IAAI,CAAC;YAAC;YAAK;SAAI,CAAC,QAAQ,CAAC,OAAO;YAC9B,OAAO,gJAAY,CAAC,IAAI,CAAC;gBAAE,OAAO;YAAe,GAAG;gBAAE,QAAQ;YAAI;QACpE;QACA,IAAI,CAAC,WAAW;YACd,OAAO,gJAAY,CAAC,IAAI,CAAC;gBAAE,OAAO;YAAoB,GAAG;gBAAE,QAAQ;YAAI;QACzE;QAEA,yBAAyB;QACzB,MAAM,eAAe,MAAM,iHAAE,CAAC,KAAK,CACjC,CAAC,2EAA2E,CAAC,EAC7E;YAAC;YAAU;SAAU;QAGvB,IAAI,aAAa,IAAI,CAAC,MAAM,GAAG,GAAG;YAChC,yCAAyC;YACzC,MAAM,UAAU,MAAM,iHAAE,CAAC,KAAK,CAC5B,CAAC,kDAAkD,CAAC,EACpD;gBAAC;aAAS;YAEZ,OAAO,gJAAY,CAAC,IAAI,CAAC;gBACvB,GAAG,QAAQ,IAAI,CAAC,EAAE;gBAClB,eAAe;gBACf,WAAW,aAAa,IAAI,CAAC,EAAE,CAAC,SAAS;YAC3C;QACF;QAEA,kBAAkB;QAClB,MAAM,iHAAE,CAAC,KAAK,CACZ,CAAC,+EAA+E,CAAC,EACjF;YAAC;YAAU;YAAW;SAAK;QAG7B,2BAA2B;QAC3B,MAAM,UAAU,SAAS,MAAM,YAAY;QAC3C,MAAM,SAAS,MAAM,iHAAE,CAAC,KAAK,CAC3B,CAAC,mBAAmB,EAAE,QAAQ,GAAG,EAAE,QAAQ,6CAA6C,CAAC,EACzF;YAAC;SAAS;QAGZ,OAAO,gJAAY,CAAC,IAAI,CAAC;YAAE,GAAG,OAAO,IAAI,CAAC,EAAE;YAAE,eAAe;YAAO,WAAW;QAAK;IACtF,EAAE,OAAO,OAAO;QACd,QAAQ,KAAK,CAAC,mBAAmB;QACjC,OAAO,gJAAY,CAAC,IAAI,CAAC;YAAE,OAAO,MAAM,OAAO;QAAC,GAAG;YAAE,QAAQ;QAAI;IACnE;AACF"}}]
